ssot_role: Canonical SSOT for HONG-21 (P0-SREG-01). HONG-22 and HONG-23 must extend this artifact without redefining the required field vocabulary.
scope_note: This v1 artifact fixes schema and vocabulary only. Mapping rules and rollup policy remain open work.

stage_id.description: Stage key such as P0 or P1.

registry_id.description: Stable registry identifier governed by this schema baseline.

item_id.description: Stable item identifier used by downstream mapping and rollup work.

layer.description: Fixed layer vocabulary: Layer1, Layer2, Layer3, or Layer4.

status_semantics.description: Fixed status vocabulary shared by downstream registry consumers.

evidence_type.description: Evidence category used to justify completion state.

evidence_ref.description: Repo path, PR reference, commit SHA, or SSOT path-key.

degrade_rule.description: Fallback behavior when evidence or schema validity degrades.

kill_switch.description: Hard stop condition when the registry becomes unsafe to use.

blocked_by.description: Explicit blocker identifiers; empty list when no blocker is active.

baseline_entries.degrade_rule: If the baseline schema drifts or fails validation, downgrade downstream usage to TODO and resume manual audit.
baseline_entries.kill_switch: If more than one competing stage registry baseline exists, stop downstream adoption until one validated file remains.
baseline_entries.next_action: HONG-22 and HONG-23 must extend this baseline for mapping and rollup without redefining field names or vocabularies.
